meaning_english: To make a formal judgment on a disputed matter.
A written statement confirmed by oath or affirmation, for use as evidence in court.
An official pardon for people who have been convicted of political offenses.

meaning_kannada: ಮತಾಂದ ಅಥವಾ ಹಠಮಾರಿ (ತನ್ನ ಅಭಿಪ್ರಾಯವೇ ಶ್ರೇಷ್ಠ ಎನ್ನುವವನು)
meaning_english: A person who is obstinately or unreasonably attached to a belief or opinion.
A system of government in which most of the important decisions are taken by state officials.
Within the jurisdiction of a court.
The fact of being descended from the same ancestor.
The profession or skill of managing international relations.
Theft or misappropriation of funds placed in one's trust.
A mass departure of people.
The killing of one's brother or sister.
Easily persuaded to believe something; credulous.
The killing of one person by another.
A charge of misconduct made against the holder of a public office.
A formal charge or accusation of a serious crime.
An authoritative warning or order from a court to do or not do something.
The official power to make legal decisions and judgments.
Theft of personal property.
A published false statement that is damaging to a person's reputation.
A large and important work of art, music, or literature.
The practice among those with power of favoring relatives or friends.
The offense of willfully telling an untruth in a court after having taken an oath.
A person who brings a case against another in a court of law.
The direct vote of all the members of an electorate on an important public question.

meaning_kannada: ಕೋರಂ (ಸಭೆ ನಡೆಸಲು ಬೇಕಾದ ಕನಿಷ್ಠ ಸದಸ್ಯರ ಸಂಖ್ಯೆ)
meaning_english: The minimum number of members of an assembly that must be present to make its proceedings valid.
A general vote by the electorate on a single political question which has been referred to them for a direct decision.
The action or crime of making a false spoken statement damaging to a person's reputation.
The crime of betraying one's country.
A decision or vote held by everyone involved.
A decision on an issue of fact in a civil or criminal case.
